payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Narrow silver metal picture frame (vertical) showing a partial beach print with blue sky, yellow umbrella, sand and visible printed text; glass front appears glossy and reflective, frame edge is cropped at the image border — estimated ~0.7 m from camera.
